## Type

## Review checklist

- [ ] I linked the relevant issue or explained why there is none.
- [ ] I kept API keys, tokens, request IDs, and customer data out of the diff.
- [ ] I updated docs/examples that are affected by this change.
- [ ] I ran the relevant smoke check or manually verified the rendered docs.
- [ ] If this changes an agent skill, destructive or external-world actions are clearly gated.
